temples.name: Tirupparankundram
temples.intro: A sacred Murugan hill-temple tradition associated with divine union, courage and the beginning of the Arupadai Veedu pilgrimage journey.
temples.highlight: Begin the six-temple journey with humility, clarity and prayer.
practice: Offer a quiet prayer before reading
Read one verified hymn or temple note

temples.name: Tiruchendur
temples.theme: Protection, courage and victory over adversity
temples.intro: A celebrated seashore Murugan temple tradition associated with courage, protection, devotion and victory over destructive forces.
temples.highlight: Reflect on courage disciplined by compassion and dharma.
practice: Add the temple to the local pilgrimage list

temples.name: Palani
temples.intro: A renowned hill-temple tradition that inspires simplicity, self-knowledge, restraint and the understanding that wisdom is greater than possession.
temples.highlight: Carry less, observe more and let devotion become inward clarity.
practice: Use reduced-motion mode for calm reading
Save one reflection in the browser

temples.name: Swamimalai
temples.intro: A sacred teaching tradition in which Murugan is revered as the divine teacher, calling the devotee toward disciplined learning and humility before knowledge.
temples.highlight: Approach sacred knowledge as a responsibility, not merely information.
practice: Mark any unverified statement for review

temples.name: Tiruttani
temples.intro: A hill-temple tradition associated with peace after conflict, emotional restoration, devotion and the steady return to spiritual balance.
temples.highlight: True victory is completed only when the mind returns to peace.
practice: Pause for one minute of silence

temples.name: Pazhamudircholai
temples.theme: Grace, abundance and harmony with nature
temples.intro: A sacred forest and hill tradition that evokes maturity, abundance, compassion, learning and the relationship between devotion and nature.
temples.highlight: Complete the journey with gratitude, generosity and reverence for life.
